'''Ettam''' was a city on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] that contained several farms. Just before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Akobi]] [[Ettam massacre|assaulted the town]], resulting in many unintentional deaths when the Empire thought a medical center was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] outpost.

{{City-stub}}
